ddls:
CREATE TABLE "dogs" (
  "dog_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dog */,
  "dog_name" TEXT /* Name of the dog */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the dog (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the breed of the dog */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the dog */,
  "colour" TEXT /* Colour of the dog (e.g., Brindle, Black) */,
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the borough where the dog is located */,
  "microchip_id" TEXT /* Microchip ID of the dog */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the dog */,
  "spayed_neutered" INTEGER /* Whether the dog is spayed or neutered */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the dog */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the dog */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dog_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dogs_breed_id FOREIGN KEY ("breed_id") REFERENCES breeds ("breed_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dogs_borough_id FOREIGN KEY ("borough_id") REFERENCES boroughs ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "breeds" (
  "breed_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each breed */,
  "breed_name" TEXT /* Name of the breed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the breed */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the breed (e.g., Small, Medium, Large) */,
  "grooming_needs" TEXT /* Grooming needs of the breed (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "energy_level" TEXT /* Energy level of the breed (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("breed_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boroughs" (
  "borough_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borough */,
  "borough_name" TEXT /* Name of the borough */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the borough */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the borough */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borough_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dog_owners" (
  "dog_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dog */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner */,
  "ownership_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the ownership started */,
  "ownership_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the ownership ended (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dog_id", "owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "veterinarians" (
  "vet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each veterinarian */,
  "vet_name" TEXT /* Full name of the veterinarian */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the veterinarian */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the veterinarian */,
  "clinic_name" TEXT /* Name of the veterinarian's clinic */,
  "clinic_address" TEXT /* Address of the veterinarian's clinic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "dog_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dog */,
  "vet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the veterinarian providing the vaccination */,
  "vaccination_date" TEXT /* Date when the vaccination was given */,
  "vaccination_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccination (e.g., Rabies, Distemper) */,
  "next_vaccination_due_date" TEXT /* Date when the next vaccination is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_records_dog_id FOREIGN KEY ("dog_id") REFERENCES dogs ("dog_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_records_vet_id FOREIGN KEY ("vet_id") REFERENCES veterinarians ("vet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spaying_neutering_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spaying/neutering record */,
  "dog_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dog */,
  "vet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the veterinarian performing the procedure */,
  "procedure_date" TEXT /* Date when the procedure was performed */,
  "procedure_type" TEXT /* Type of procedure (e.g., Spaying, Neutering) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spaying_neutering_records_vet_id FOREIGN KEY ("vet_id") REFERENCES veterinarians ("vet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spaying_neutering_records_dog_id FOREIGN KEY ("dog_id") REFERENCES dogs ("dog_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "dog_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dog */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date when the license was issued */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the license expires */,
  "license_type" TEXT /* Type of license (e.g., Annual, Lifetime) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_licenses_dog_id FOREIGN KEY ("dog_id") REFERENCES dogs ("dog_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lost_dogs" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lost dog report */,
  "dog_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dog */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was filed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the lost dog */,
  "lost_location" TEXT /* Location where the dog was lost */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lost_dogs_dog_id FOREIGN KEY ("dog_id") REFERENCES dogs ("dog_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "found_dogs" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each found dog report */,
  "dog_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dog */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was filed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the found dog */,
  "found_location" TEXT /* Location where the dog was found */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_found_dogs_dog_id FOREIGN KEY ("dog_id") REFERENCES dogs ("dog_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, veterinarian, dog owner) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_logins" (
  "login_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each login attempt */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user attempting to log in */,
  "login_date" TEXT /* Date of the login attempt */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Time of the login attempt */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the device used for the login attempt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("login_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_logins_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected by the change */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected by the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_time" TEXT /* Time of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_audits_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Time of the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Text of the notification message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
